mapper.select:
SELECT candidate.sgg_cd, candidate.sgg_nm, candidate.umd_cd, candidate.umd_nm, candidate.display_name FROM ( SELECT s.sgg_cd, s.sgg_nm, NULL AS umd_cd, '' AS umd_nm, s.sgg_nm AS display_name, 0 AS sort_order FROM ( SELECT r.sgg_cd, MIN(r.sgg_nm) AS sgg_nm FROM region r GROUP BY r.sgg_cd ) s WHERE REPLACE(s.sgg_nm, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE( CASE WHEN RIGHT(s.sgg_nm, 1) IN ('구', '군') THEN LEFT(s.sgg_nm, CHAR_LENGTH(s.sgg_nm) - 1) ELSE s.sgg_nm END, ' ', '' ) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\'
UNION ALL
SELECT r.sgg_cd, r.sgg_nm, r.umd_cd, r.umd_nm, CONCAT(r.sgg_nm, ' ', r.umd_nm) AS display_name, 1 AS sort_order FROM region r WHERE REPLACE(CONCAT(r.sgg_nm, r.umd_nm), ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE( CONCAT( CASE WHEN RIGHT(r.sgg_nm, 1) IN ('구', '군') THEN LEFT(r.sgg_nm, CHAR_LENGTH(r.sgg_nm) - 1) ELSE r.sgg_nm END, r.umd_nm ), ' ', '' ) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE(r.sgg_nm, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE(r.umd_nm, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' ) candidate ORDER BY candidate.sort_order ASC, candidate.sgg_cd ASC, candidate.umd_nm ASC LIMIT 100

SELECT fr.sgg_cd, COALESCE(r.sgg_nm, rs.sgg_nm) AS sgg_nm, CASE WHEN fr.umd_nm = '' THEN NULL ELSE r.umd_cd END AS umd_cd, fr.umd_nm, CASE WHEN fr.umd_nm = '' THEN rs.sgg_nm ELSE CONCAT_WS(' ', r.sgg_nm, NULLIF(r.umd_nm, '')) END AS display_name, ( SELECT sd.deal_amount FROM sale_deal sd JOIN property p ON p.id = sd.property_id WHERE p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND (fr.umd_nm = '' OR p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm) ORDER BY sd.deal_date DESC, sd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_sale_price, ( SELECT rd.deposit FROM rent_deal rd JOIN property p ON p.id = rd.property_id WHERE p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND (fr.umd_nm = '' OR p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm) AND rd.monthly_rent = 0 ORDER BY rd.deal_date DESC, rd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_jeonse_deposit, ( SELECT rd.deposit FROM rent_deal rd JOIN property p ON p.id = rd.property_id WHERE p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND (fr.umd_nm = '' OR p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm) AND rd.monthly_rent > 0 ORDER BY rd.deal_date DESC, rd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_monthly_rent_deposit, ( SELECT rd.monthly_rent FROM rent_deal rd JOIN property p ON p.id = rd.property_id WHERE p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND (fr.umd_nm = '' OR p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm) AND rd.monthly_rent > 0 ORDER BY rd.deal_date DESC, rd.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_monthly_rent, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sale_deal sd JOIN property p ON p.id = sd.property_id WHERE p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND (fr.umd_nm = '' OR p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm) AND sd.deal_date >= #{oneYearAgo} ) AS sale_deal_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rent_deal rd JOIN property p ON p.id = rd.property_id WHERE p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND (fr.umd_nm = '' OR p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm) AND rd.monthly_rent = 0 AND rd.deal_date >= #{oneYearAgo} ) AS jeonse_deal_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rent_deal rd JOIN property p ON p.id = rd.property_id WHERE p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND (fr.umd_nm = '' OR p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm) AND rd.monthly_rent > 0 AND rd.deal_date >= #{oneYearAgo} ) AS monthly_rent_deal_count FROM favorite_region fr LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sgg_cd, MIN(sgg_nm) AS sgg_nm FROM region GROUP BY sgg_cd ) rs ON rs.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd LEFT JOIN region r ON r.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND r.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm WHERE fr.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY fr.created_at DESC, fr.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite_region (user_id, sgg_cd, umd_nm) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sggCd}, #{umdNm})
